sentences.arabic: تُرِيدُ مَرْيَمُ أَنْ تُصْبِحَ مُهَنْدِسَةً مِعْمَارِيَّةً مَشْهُورَةً فِي الْمُسْتَقْبَلِ.
sentences.translation: Merjem želi postati poznata arhitektica u budućnosti.
sentences.translationEn: Maryam wants to become a famous architect in the future.

sentences.arabic: تَدْرُسُ التَّصْمِيمَ فِي الْجَامِعَةِ وَتَقْضِي وَقْتًا طَوِيلًا فِي الْمَكْتَبَةِ.
sentences.translation: Studira dizajn na univerzitetu i provodi mnogo vremena u biblioteci.
sentences.translationEn: She studies design at the university and spends a lot of time in the library.

sentences.arabic: هِيَ تُحِبُّ تَخْطِيطَ الْمُدُنِ الْحَدِيثَةِ وَتَحْلُمُ بِتَطْوِيرِ بَلَدِهَا.
sentences.translation: Ona voli planiranje modernih gradova i sanja o razvoju svoje zemlje.
sentences.translationEn: She loves planning modern cities and dreams of developing her country.
